title: Fatty Juicy Slovakian Turnips Roast
description: A rich and flavorful Slovakian-inspired dish featuring turnips, perfect for a date-night dinner.
instructions: Peel the turnips and slice them into 1-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, toss the turnip slices with olive oil, garlic, caraway seeds, salt, and pepper until they are evenly coated.
Transfer the turnips to a large baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast for 20 minutes.
While the turnips are roasting, toss the sliced potatoes with a pinch of salt and pepper in a separate bowl.
Add the potatoes to the baking sheet with the turnips and continue roasting for an additional 25 minutes.
During the last 10 minutes of roasting, add the bacon fat and lemon juice to the turnips and potatoes, tossing to combine.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and let the vegetables rest for 5 minutes before serving.
To serve, place the turnips and potatoes on a plate and spoon the pan juices over the top.
